<!-- Help us find and fix stale guides. Fill in as much as you can. -->

## Page URL

## What is wrong or out of date?

<!-- Be specific: which section, which strategy, which item description? -->
<!-- "The stage 2 hold described in 'Recommended holds' no longer works — the door opens 5 seconds earlier." -->

## When did you last play this map?

<!-- Approximate date is fine, e.g. "Last week", "June 2026". -->

## Current map version (if known)

<!-- Check the in-game Workshop page or the map's loading screen for a version string. -->
<!-- Leave blank if you don't know. -->

## Link to updated information (if any)

<!-- A YouTube video, Discord thread, or other source that shows the current correct info. -->
<!-- Leave blank if you don't have one. -->
